app.name: Site Gate
app.subtitle: Self-use: friction before distraction, honest log afterward.
lang.hint: Built-in locales + your own overrides below. Keys match en.json.
sites.label: Blocked domains (one per line)
sites.hint: Without https:// — host,budget only applies in Lock → Budget → Individual per site.
sites.globalBudgetHint: 0 = unlimited — counts all gate completions today
sites.endorsedHint: host,minutes,label — active tab time counts toward daily goals
assistant.title: Just do it
assistant.subtitle: One mode, clear behavior — Site Gate sets the rest. Shields you from option overload.
assistant.mode.justBlockDesc: Listed domains hit a short gate (1 question). No daily budget.
assistant.mode.encouragedDesc: Full question round — finish it and you're through. No daily cap.
assistant.mode.budgetDesc: Full power: list/per-site budgets, commitment lock, growth tracking.
assistant.effect.justBlock: Sets: permanent gate, 1 question per visit, no budget screen. Per-site host,budget cleared. Edit domains under Websites.
assistant.effect.encouragedEnter: Sets: permanent gate, full question round, always pass after completing. Endorsed sites & growth still work. No daily budget.
assistant.effect.budgetSystem: Unlocks Lock-tab budget modes, per-site limits, commitment lock integration. You control the details.
assistant.guardHint: Budget controls under Lock are only active in Budget System mode.
assistant.lockBudgetGuarded: Managed by Just do it — switch to Budget System to edit gate/budget modes here.
assistant.banner: Just do it: {mode} — advanced budget settings are simplified. Change mode under Just do it tab.
questions.roundLimitHint: 0 = all active. Otherwise max N (see mode).
questions.editorHint: Order via ↑↓. Inactive questions are skipped.
questions.toast.new: Question created — edit text and save.
questions.toast.deleted: Question removed — don't forget to save.
questions.field.label: Question
theme.hint: Gate appearance — CSS variables per theme.
lock.banner.active: 🔒 Commitment lock active — protection against impulsive weakening.
lock.banner.free: Open — you can change settings freely.
lock.active.title: Commitment lock active
lock.active.hint: You can tighten rules, not loosen them. Witness or expiry to unlock.
lock.inactive.title: Activate commitment lock
lock.inactive.hint: Protects block list and questions. Impulse budget + friction stacking.
lock.budgetSectionHint: How blocked domains are enforced. Protected while commitment lock is active.
lock.modeStaticDesc: Every visit runs the question gate. No daily caps.
lock.modeBudgetDesc: After N gate rounds per day, blocked until tomorrow.
lock.commitmentHint: Witness-protected — freezes gate mode, block list, and questions.
lock.hostBudgetsHint: Only in „Individual per site“. Also host,budget under Websites.
lock.hostBudgetsEmpty: No blocked sites — add domains under Websites first.
lock.effectStatic: Effect: Gate always runs for blocked domains. Endorsed-site growth tracking unchanged. Commitment lock still protects block list & questions.
lock.effectBudgetList: Effect: Total gate completions today count toward one shared limit for all blocked sites.
lock.effectBudgetPerSite: Effect: Only sites with a set limit are capped. Others are always gated without a daily cap.
lock.witnessHint: Stored as hash only — not recoverable.
lock.confirm: I understand: until expiry or witness I cannot loosen protection.
lock.dailyStatic: Mode: permanent gate — no daily cap
logs.hint: Answers and target URL — local reflection only.
gate.title: Question round
gate.finish: You survived the round. Loading site …
gate.previewMeta: Theme preview — not a real gate run
gate.budget.title: Impulse budget reached
gate.budget.hostBody: Today {used}/{limit} rounds used for this site.
gate.budget.hint: Budget resets tomorrow — or walk away now.
gate.error.shallow: Too short and shallow. Explain in more detail.
gate.error.honest: That doesn't count as an honest answer.
gate.error.duration: Give an approximate duration (number or minutes/hours).
gate.error.phrase: Not exact. Field cleared — start again.
val.default.phrase: I consciously skip impulsive scrolling and accept the friction.
progress.title: Dual gate — restraint & growth
progress.hint: Integrity from resisting impulses; growth from active time on endorsed sites.
progress.cleanStreakHint: Days without completing gate to blocked sites
progress.modeHint: Adaptive: long clean streak slightly eases wait; relapse adds one confirm step.
progress.resetConfirm: Reset all streak and level data?
